H6955.e: from an unused root meaning to ally oneself; allied;

H6956.d: a Kohathite (collectively) or descendants of Kehath

H6957.d: a cord (as connecting), especially formeasuring; figuratively, a rule; also a rim, a musical string or accord
H6957.k: line. Compare H6978 (קַו־קַו)lemma קַו־קַי yod, corrected to קַו־קַו.

H6960.d: to bind together (perhaps by twisting), i.e. collect; (figuratively) to expect
H6960.k: gather (together), look, patiently, tarry, wait (for, on, upon).

H6962.d: properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) detest

H6963.e: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;
H6963.k: [phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thunder(-ing), voice, [phrase] yell.

H6964.d: Kolajah, the name of two Israelites
H6964.e: from H6963 (קוֹל) and H3050 (יָהּ); voice of Jah;

H6965.d: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)
H6965.k: abide, accomplish, [idiom] be clearer, confirm, continue, decree, [idiom] be dim, endure, [idiom] enemy, enjoin, get up, make good, help, hold, (help to) lift up (again), make, [idiom] but newly, ordain, perform, pitch, raise (up), rear (up), remain, (a-) rise (up) (again, against), rouse up, set (up), (e-) stablish, (make to) stand (up), stir up, strengthen, succeed, (as-, make) sure(-ly), (be) up(-hold, -rising).

H6966.d: {to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)}
H6966.k: appoint, establish, make, raise up self, (a-) rise (up), (make to) stand, set (up).

H6969.d: to strike a musical note, i.e. chant or wail (at a funeral)

H6970.e: probably from H6972 (קוּץ) in the original sense of cutting off; curtailment;

H6972.e: a primitive root; to clip off; used only as denominative from H7019 (קַיִץ);

H6973.d: to be (causatively, make) disgusted or anxious
H6973.e: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of severing oneself from (compare H6962 (קוּט)));
H6973.k: abhor, be distressed, be grieved, loathe, vex, be weary.

H6974.e: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of abruptness in starting up from sleep (compare H3364 (יָקַץ)));

H6975.e: or קֹץ; from H6972 (קוּץ) (in the sense of pricking);

H6976.d: Kots, the name of two Israelites

H6977.e: feminine passive participle of H6972 (קוּץ) in its original sense;

H6978.e: from H6957 (קַו) (in the sense of a fastening);

H6979.d: to trench; by implication, to throw forth;  to wall up, whether literal (to build a wall) or figurative (to estop)
H6979.e: a primitive root; also denominative from H7023 (קִיר)
H6979.k: break down, cast out, destroy, dig.

H6980.d: (only plural) trenches, i.e. a web (as if so formed)

H6981.d: Kore, the name of two Israelites
H6981.e: or קֹרֵא; (1 Chronicles 26:1), active participle of H7121 (קָרָא); crier;

H6982.d: a rafter (forming trenches as it were); by implication, a roof

H6983.e: a primitive root; to bend; used only as denominative for H3369 (יָקֹשׁ),

H6984.e: from the passive participle of H6983 (קוֹשׁ) and H3050 (יָהּ); entrapped of Jah;

H6985.e: from H6990 (קָטַט) in the sense of abbreviation;

H6986.e: from an unused root meaning to cut off;

H6989.e: feminine passive participle of H6999 (קָטַר); perfumed;

H6991.d: properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) put to death

H6994.d: to diminish, i.e. be (causatively, make) diminutive or (figuratively) of no account
H6994.e: a primitive root (rather denominative from H6996 (קָטָן));
H6994.k: be a (make) small (thing), be not worthy.

H6995.d: a pettiness, i.e. the little finger

H6996.d: abbreviated, i.e. diminutive, literally (in quantity, size or number) or figuratively (in age or importance)
H6996.k: least, less(-er), little (one), small(-est, one, quantity, thing), young(-er, -est).

H6999.d: to smoke, i.e. turn into fragrance by fire (especially as an act of worship)
H6999.e: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of fumigation in a close place and perhaps thus driving out the occupants);
H6999.k: burn (incense, sacrifice) (upon), (altar for) incense, kindle, offer (incense, a sacrifice).
